title: Master's PvP Pack
description: A simple 16x red PvP texture pack.
body:
# ❤️ Master's PVP Pack

![Master's PvP Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nyMJc1R4/images/c2cb1de55ff1f7ee5d3c5093e64e68dff1862345.png)

# 📃 Overview
Master's PVP Pack is a simple 16x red PvP texture pack. It aims to fulfill what a PvP pack is, yet maintaining a minimal style. Check out the gallery [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/masters-pvp-pack/gallery).

# ➕ Changes / Additions

- Swords
- Tools
- Armor Sets
- GUI
- Resources
- Bow
- Lower Shield
- Totem of Undying
- End Crystals
- Respawn Anchors
- Critical Hit Particles
- Removed Explosion Particles
- Golden Foods
- Ender Pearls
- Wool ([VanillaTweaks](https://www.vanillatweaks.net))
- And More!

# 📦 Other Packs
You can find my other projects on my [profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheMaster223).
